_comment: Sericia-branded placeholder thumbnails per Medusa product.handle. These point at /public/placeholders/*.svg (deployed with the storefront) — visual grammar matches LuxuryLoader + logo-mark for brand continuity. Replace with real photography URLs when brand photos arrive, then re-run `npm run products:upload-thumbnails` to sync Medusa. Note: brand assets are kanji-free by project rule — placeholders use Latin typography only.
_usage: npm run products:upload-thumbnails  (requires MEDUSA_ADMIN_EMAIL + MEDUSA_ADMIN_PASSWORD env). MUST run AFTER the storefront deploy so the SVG URLs return 200 before Medusa stores the reference.

drop-001-tea-miso-shiitake.attribution: Sericia brand placeholder — Drop No. 01 bundle variant
